name: QA 1616
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1616

pmlogger push testing



valgrind variant, see qa/1611 for the non-valgrind variant



check-group-include: pmlogger pmproxy pmlogpush



Copyright (c) 2025 Red Hat.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2204 reproduce

output mismatch (see 1616.out.bad)

> pmproxy failed to start on port 44322 after 20 seconds
